login.title: SuperAdmin sign in
login.formLead: Access full control of the agricultural platform.
login.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
login.forbidden: Access is limited to authorized SuperAdmin or institution accounts.
login.errorGoogleHint: Invalid password or Google-only account. Use « Continue with Google », then set a console password in Settings.
login.googleHint: Google account? Sign in once with Google, then create a password in Settings.
login.oauthRedirectError: Google sign-in failed: Supabase redirected to the mobile app (exp://). Add the URL below to Redirect URLs (see orange box).
login.oauthCallbackError: Google callback failed: {reason}. Check Google Cloud Console → Authorized redirect URI: https://YOUR-PROJECT.supabase.co/auth/v1/callback
login.apiUnreachable: API unreachable. Start the API (npm run start:dev in apps/api) and try again.
login.oauthNoUrl: Google sign-in failed. Check Supabase → Redirect URLs (URL below, not /en/login) and restart npm run dev:admin after editing .env.local.
login.oauthEnvMissing: Supabase env vars missing in the browser. Check apps/admin-platform/.env.local, then restart npm run dev:admin.

landing.heroLead: The platform connecting producers, veterinarians, buyers and institutions to manage livestock end to end — from herd to market.

hero.sideLead: Digitize your pig farming operations, track your herd and connect with stakeholders across your value chain in West Africa.
hero.presenceHint: Deployed in Côte d'Ivoire · app usable worldwide

story.title: Born on the farm, built for the field
story.lead: E2IA begins with farmer-entrepreneurs who faced the same challenges as you: tracking herds by hand, negotiating without reliable data, and lacking visibility with banks and partners.
story.body: Facing these daily pig-farming challenges, we built Fermier Pro — an app designed from the barn, not from a desk. Every module solves a real problem we lived — and that hundreds of farmers still face in Côte d'Ivoire.
story.quote: "We don't digitize farming for technology's sake. We do it because a farmer deserves the same tools as a large enterprise."

problems.title: What we set out to solve

traceability.title: Invisible herd
traceability.body: Headcounts, categories and history scattered in notebooks — impossible to decide quickly and well.

finance.title: Opaque finances
finance.body: Without income and expense traceability, access to credit and banking partners remains blocked.

feed.title: Feeding by guesswork
feed.body: Growth, starter and brewer's grain stocks poorly tracked: shortages, waste and soaring costs.

actors.title: Disconnected value chain
actors.body: Producers, vets, buyers and institutions in silos — no trust, no flow.

solution.lead: Fermier Pro: the answer born in the field
solution.body: From E2IA to Fermier Pro, one conviction — give Ivorian farmers (and beyond) a simple, mobile and credible platform to produce better, sell better and grow sustainably.

ambition.title: Digitizing livestock supply chains
ambition.lead: At E2IA, we are building Fermier Pro to bring together all stakeholders across pig, poultry and cattle value chains on a single platform. Our goal: make farming more transparent, profitable and resilient, from producer to consumer.
ambition.imageAlt: Pig in traditional farming in Africa
ambition.imageCaption: The pig value chain, from farm to local market

actors.title: All stakeholders united
actors.body: Producers, veterinarians, traders, processors and health authorities collaborate on one ecosystem.

traceability.title: End-to-end traceability
traceability.body: Track every animal, batch and transaction to build trust in local and regional markets.

impact.title: Measurable field impact
impact.body: Practical tools to improve productivity, animal health and farmer incomes.

items.herd: Complete inventory, batches and performance for every animal.
items.health: Health records, vaccinations and real-time alerts.
items.marketplace: Transparent buying and selling with reference prices.
items.feeding: Optimized rations and feed stock management.

modules.title: Every module to run your farm
modules.lead: Fermier Pro covers the full production cycle: herd management, reproduction, feeding, finance, health, commerce and artificial intelligence.

finance.title: Finance & Wallet
finance.body: Track income, expenses, transactions and balances in real time for clear financial management.

herd.title: Herd management
herd.body: Animal inventory, batches, performance and complete history for each animal.

gestation.title: Gestation & Breeding
gestation.body: Plan matings, track pregnancies and anticipate births.

feeding.title: Feeding
feeding.body: Manage rations, feed stocks and optimize feeding costs.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.body: Buy and sell animals transparently with reference prices and dispute tracking.

health.title: Animal health
health.body: Health records, vaccinations, treatments and alerts to protect your herd.

sanitaryMap.title: Health map
sanitaryMap.body: Visualize disease outbreaks and health alerts on an interactive map.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.body: Personalized advice, analytics and recommendations for better decisions.

contact.title: Let's talk about your value chain
contact.lead: Want to deploy Fermier Pro, become a partner or learn more about our solutions? The E2IA team is here to help.

showcase.title: Run your farm from your pocket
showcase.lead: XOF wallet, feed stocks, herd by batch, marketplace and certified banking reports — everything your farmers already use every day.

herd.title: Herd organized by buildings and categories
herd.body: Sows, boars, piglets, fattening and starter batches: see your headcount at a glance and manage every pen from your phone.

finance.title: Traceable finance, easier credit
finance.body: Income, expenses and Fermier Pro score exportable as a certified banking synthesis — to reassure institutions and speed up access to finance.

ai.title: AI at the service of the field
ai.body: Personalized advice on building occupancy, herd health and daily decisions — right in the producer dashboard.

showcase.ctaLead: Ready to digitize your pig value chain?

landing.footer: Digitizing livestock supply chains across Africa and beyond.

hero.subtitle: Farms, producers, animal health — all from one powerful dashboard.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.lead: Enter your SuperAdmin account email. We will send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
forgotPassword.error: Could not send the email. Please try again shortly.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.lead: Choose a password for your SuperAdmin console.
resetPassword.expired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new reset link.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Monitor the agricultural platform: farms, producers, and animal health at a glance.

welcome.lead: Track sign-ups, animal health, and marketplace activity in real time.

insight.title: Growth
insight.body: {farms} active farms and {users} users on the platform.

vets.title: Vet validation
vets.pageLead: Review applications, verify diplomas and validate veterinarian profiles.
vets.directoryDesc: Filter by verification status and open each candidate's detail page.

users.title: Users
users.directoryDesc: Search, filter by status and open user profiles.

moderation.banWarning: Banning disables access. Data is retained.
moderation.deleteAccountWarning: Irreversible. All user data will be deleted.
moderation.durationAccountOnly: Duration only applies to a global account suspension.
moderation.subject: Subject
moderation.sendPush: Also send a mobile push notification
moderation.bulkMessageLead: The message appears in each user's admin inbox (and as push if enabled).

finance.note: Aggregated data for the last 90 days.

stats.title: Aggregated statistics
stats.pageLead: Anonymized regional indicators by section, with an internal view for superadmins only.

regional.emptySections: No statistics have been assigned to you — contact the administrator.
regional.noDepartments: No departments in the selected period.
regional.superadminHint: Full superadmin view — use “View as” to preview an institution.

export.hint: All authorized sections for the selected period.

institutionPreview.banner: Preview as: {label} — output identical to the institution view

map.title: Health map
map.subtitle: Granular surveillance (sector, city, country) to contain epidemic clusters.
map.empty: No declared suspicions in this period.
map.loadError: Could not load the health map. Check the API and your admin session.
map.truncated: High volume: only the latest 10,000 records are aggregated. Narrow the period or scope.
map.pointsNote: Active suspicions with GPS — lab-unconfirmed diagnoses.
map.diagnosisHint: Choropleth filterable by declared diagnosis (not lab-confirmed).

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.pageLead: Epidemic analysis, free-form questions and help validating veterinarian applications.
ai.unavailable: AI unavailable — check GEMINI_API_KEY on the API.
ai.setupBody: The Google Gemini key must be set on the API server (not in the admin console).
ai.setupLocal: Locally: add GEMINI_API_KEY=your_key to the root .env file, then restart npm run dev:api.
ai.setupRailway: In production (Railway): Variables → add GEMINI_API_KEY, then redeploy the API.
ai.setupLink: Get a key: Google AI Studio → API Keys.

epidemic.title: Epidemiological analysis
epidemic.description: Analysis of aggregated health data (last 30 days).

ask.title: Decision support
ask.description: Ask a question about aggregated platform statistics.
ask.placeholder: E.g. Which regions show the highest health risks?

vetAssist.title: Vet validation assist
vetAssist.description: Text + diploma vision analysis for pending dossiers.
vetAssist.disclaimer: AI recommendation — final decision remains human.

auditLogs.title: Admin action log
auditLogs.subtitle: History of suspensions, bans, messages and warnings.
auditLogs.journalDesc: Last 100 moderation actions recorded on the platform.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.pageLead: Configure the platform, console access and business rules. Each section is saved independently.

sections.mapDesc: Default area shown on the mobile app map.
sections.alertsDesc: Automatic alert triggers based on case count and period.
sections.notificationsDesc: SuperAdmin email and automatic report frequency.
sections.supportDesc: Contact details shown in the app (call and Telegram).
sections.vetDesc: Commission deducted on confirmed vet appointments.
sections.walletDesc: Auto-approved withdrawal threshold without manual validation.

settings.loadError: Could not load settings. Check that the API is up to date and Prisma migrations have been applied.

fields.marketplaceCommissionHint: Charged to the buyer at the close of each marketplace sale (e.g. 5 = 5%).
fields.sellerMarketplaceCommissionHint: Deducted from the seller's payout at the close of each marketplace sale (e.g. 5 = 5%).
fields.vetCommissionHint: Deducted from the vet's payout when service completion is confirmed (e.g. 5 = 5%).
fields.supportPhoneHint: Number shown in the mobile app (call button). Leave empty to use the SUPPORT_PHONE environment variable.
fields.supportTelegramHint: URL or @username for support. Leave empty to use SUPPORT_TELEGRAM_URL on the API.
fields.withdrawalThresholdHint: Above this amount, an admin must approve the withdrawal.
fields.weightArbitrationMinDiffKgHint: Per-animal gap below which the sale continues without arbitration (e.g. 1 kg).
fields.weightArbitrationCumulativeMinDiffKgHint: For multiple animals: total gap required to allow arbitration (e.g. 5 kg).
fields.merchantPremiumPriceXofHint: Full price for one billing period (before promo).
fields.merchantPremiumMaxShopsHint: Maximum number of shops for a Premium merchant profile.
fields.merchantPremiumBillingUnitHint: Merchant billing cycle unit. Changing this realigns next billing dates for active subscribers.
fields.merchantPremiumBillingIntervalHint: Every N units (e.g. 1 = each month, 7 = every 7 days).
fields.merchantPremiumGraceDaysHint: In hour mode: grace hours. Otherwise: calendar days.
fields.merchantPremiumTrialUnitsHint: Duration expressed in the merchant billing unit.
fields.producerPremiumPriceXofHint: Full price for one producer billing period (before promo).
fields.producerPremiumBillingUnitHint: Producer billing cycle unit. Changing this realigns next billing dates for active subscribers.
fields.producerPremiumBillingIntervalHint: Every N units (e.g. 1 = each hour for testing).
fields.producerPremiumGraceDaysHint: In hour mode: grace hours. Otherwise: calendar days.
fields.producerPremiumTrialUnitsHint: Duration expressed in the producer billing unit.

password.title: Console password
password.description: Set an email password to sign in without Google. You can change it anytime.

admins.title: Administrators
admins.description: Add administrator accounts by email. Each admin can change their initial password on this page.
admins.passwordHint: Share this password with the new admin; they can change it under “Console password”.
admins.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

institutions.title: Institution access
institutions.description: Create partner accounts (ministries, institutes) with limited menus and permissions. An invite email lets them set a password on first sign-in.
institutions.inviteLead: The user will receive an email with a link to create their password (first sign-in only). Later sign-ins use email + password, with forgot-password available.
institutions.permissionsRequired: Select at least one menu with read or write access.
institutions.statSectionsLead: Deny-by-default: only checked sections are visible when the Statistics menu is granted.
institutions.scheduledReportsLead: Automatic generation using the institution's authorized sections.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.pageLead: Listings, transactions, weight disputes, platform revenue and merchant moderation.

listingDetail.title: Listing detail
listingDetail.deleteConfirmBody: Listing « {title} » will be permanently removed (offers, favorites, linked chat rooms). Closed or cancelled related transactions will also be purged. This cannot be undone.
listingDetail.deleteBlockedActiveTx: An active marketplace transaction is in progress — close it before deleting the listing.

receipts.summary: {generated} receipts generated out of {total} closed transactions.

merchantShops.deleteDisabledTooltip: Order history exists — archive instead of deleting.

vetAppointments.title: Veterinary appointments
vetAppointments.subtitle: Track appointments, refunds and commissions on veterinary services.

list.refundConfirm: Confirm full refund to the producer?

pigPrice.title: 📊 PigPrice Index — Pig market prices
pigPrice.subtitle: Index computed from real transactions on the platform

feedModeration.title: Feed moderation
feedModeration.subtitle: AI-detected violations, sanctioned users, and appeals.

sectionsDesc.content: Posts and comments visible on the community feed.
sectionsDesc.events: Automatic detections and reports recorded by the AI agent.
sectionsDesc.sanctioned: Accounts suspended or restricted on the feed.
sectionsDesc.appeals: Sanction review requests awaiting a decision.

content.confirmDeletePost: Delete this post and hide it from the feed?

feedModeration.appealAcceptedDefault: Your appeal was accepted. Feed access is restored.
feedModeration.appealRejectedDefault: Your appeal was reviewed and upheld.

chatModeration.title: Chat moderation
chatModeration.subtitle: Discussion rooms (farm and direct messages) — SuperAdmin deletion.

sectionsDesc.rooms: Farm rooms and direct conversations — deletion reserved for SuperAdmins.

chatModeration.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this room and all its messages?

producerScores.title: Producer scores
producerScores.description: Producer reliability: data entry, platform usage, responsiveness (offers, chat, credit).
producerScores.listDesc: Filter by score level, recompute or block producer credit.

walletAdmin.title: Pending withdrawals
walletAdmin.subtitle: Approve or reject withdrawals above the auto threshold.
walletAdmin.pendingDesc: Each withdrawal exceeds the threshold set under Settings → Wallet.

fees.title: Wallet fees
fees.hint: 0% = free. Fees are charged to the sender (withdrawal, transfer).

merchantSubscriptions.title: Merchant subscriptions
merchantSubscriptions.subtitle: Suspend, free trial, promo and cancel Premium plans.
merchantSubscriptions.configSectionHint: Price, billing period, grace, trial and global promo for Merchant Premium.
merchantSubscriptions.promoSectionHint: Create trial, discount or promo codes for merchants to redeem at checkout.
merchantSubscriptions.invoicesSectionHint: Read-only — no manual Premium activation. Use “Verify GeniusPay” to compare provider status with the invoice.

invoiceInsight.aligned_completed: Aligned: GeniusPay and invoice both confirm payment.
invoiceInsight.provider_completed_invoice_pending: GeniusPay shows completed but invoice is still pending — webhook likely did not activate Premium.
invoiceInsight.invoice_paid_provider_not_found: Invoice paid in DB but GeniusPay reference not found.
invoiceInsight.invoice_paid_provider_pending: Invoice paid in DB but GeniusPay is not completed yet.
invoiceInsight.amount_mismatch: Amount mismatch between invoice and GeniusPay.
invoiceInsight.provider_not_completed: GeniusPay does not show a completed payment for this reference.
invoiceInsight.lookup_unavailable: Could not query GeniusPay (network or configuration).

producerSubscriptions.title: Producer subscriptions
producerSubscriptions.subtitle: Team Premium: suspend, trial, promo and cancel. Cancellation removes farm team members.
producerSubscriptions.configSectionHint: Price, billing period, grace, trial and global promo for Producer Premium (team).
producerSubscriptions.configLoadError: Could not load producer Premium configuration.
producerSubscriptions.invoicesSectionHint: Read-only — use « Verify GeniusPay » to compare provider status with the invoice.

invoiceInsight.aligned_completed: Aligned: GeniusPay and invoice both confirm payment.
invoiceInsight.provider_completed_invoice_pending: GeniusPay shows completed but invoice is still pending.
invoiceInsight.invoice_paid_provider_not_found: Invoice paid in DB but GeniusPay reference not found.
invoiceInsight.invoice_paid_provider_pending: Invoice paid in DB but GeniusPay is not completed yet.
invoiceInsight.amount_mismatch: Amount mismatch between invoice and GeniusPay.
invoiceInsight.provider_not_completed: GeniusPay does not show a completed payment for this reference.
invoiceInsight.lookup_unavailable: Could not query GeniusPay (network or configuration).
